videos.title: I AI Hunt Down a 17-Year-Old MacBook Air for Me #ManusAI #ad
videos.description: Finding a first-generation 2008 MacBook Air in good cosmetic condition with its original box is nearly impossible across eBay, Mercari, Craigslist, and other secondhand marketplaces. Manus is an AI agent that can control your browser, search multiple platforms simultaneously, compile pricing data from completed eBay auctions, and even configure saved search alerts on your behalf. Its Wide Research feature spins up dozens of parallel AI agents to synthesize massive comparisons in minutes.
